product_outcome: The deterministic bulk plan now has a resumable per-batch resolver and CLI instead of ending at contact-sheet generation.

behavior.authority: Requires a current primary_visual_critic plus independent_juror certificate quorum before resolving any case.
behavior.bindings: Revalidates plan, batch, review, case-decision, manifest, source, mask, and panel hashes.
behavior.accept: Two exact pass decisions produce accept_exact_label.
behavior.relabel: Two identical relabel decisions produce a relabel_new_immutable_version proposal; no package or pixel mutation occurs.
behavior.reject_abstain: Reject takes precedence; disagreement, uncertainty, or abstention produces abstain.
behavior.continuation: A package-specific drift or malformed case becomes an exception row and does not stop unrelated cases.
behavior.operator_output: CLI prints a compact summary plus exceptions and writes one immutable hash-bound result.

verification.broader_suite_note: An adjacent dataset-builder run had 3 pre-existing failures because the Civitai fixture cache adjusting_hair_hand_in_hair is absent; 32 other selected tests passed and no semantic executor failure occurred.

remaining_acceptance: Execute all seven real 220-package batches with promoted current critic roles and publish accepted or corrected immutable package versions; no live critic authority is claimed by this static executor evidence.
